description: Seed index of hallucination test cases — Phase 0 of v1.1.0-beta. Expanded in Phase 6 with ground truth annotations and ~80 more adversarial cases.

cases.description: 13 SSH auth failures from a real Tor exit node (185.220.101.42) against multiple accounts
cases.notes: Classic brute-force pattern; verdict should mention T1110 (Brute Force).

cases.description: 3 HTTP logs with JNDI payloads matching CVE-2021-44228 (Log4Shell)
cases.notes: CVE-2021-44228 is KEV-listed. Verdict should cite the CVE and T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application).

cases.description: 4 proxy/email logs containing phishing URLs (credential harvesting)
cases.notes: T1566 (Phishing). Watch for fabricated URLs in verdict that were not in the inputs.

cases.description: SSH session + sudo privilege escalation + payload download
cases.notes: T1021.004 (Remote Services: SSH), T1548 (Abuse Elevation Control).

cases.description: 15 DNS/HTTP beacon entries with a consistent 60s period (C2 callback)
6-phase kill chain: reconnaissance > exploit > shell > credentials > lateral > exfiltration
cases.notes: Most demanding scenario. Verdict should name at least 4 distinct MITRE techniques and a coherent timeline.

cases.description: APT-style campaign hitting multiple internal assets in parallel
cases.notes: Tests the correlation engine across assets. Watch for fabricated attribution (APT29/APT28 etc.) without evidence.

cases.description: Ransomware encryption activity propagating across fileshares
cases.notes: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact). High-stakes false-positive risk if similar backup activity is legitimate.

cases.description: Web application compromise (SQLi/RCE/upload) leading to shell
cases.notes: T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application). Watch for hallucinated CVE IDs not in the inputs.

phase_6_todo: Annotate ground truth for the 9 seed cases (expected MITRE IDs, expected evidence IDs)
Add 30 true-positive cases with ground truth from lab TARS (OpenCanary + Caldera)
Add 30 true-negative cases (legit traffic that should produce FalsePositive or Informational)
Add 20 adversarial cases (under-specified alerts, ambiguous IoCs, truncated logs)
Add 20 hallucination trap cases (context that induces fabrication: APT-like behavior without evidence, plausible-sounding CVEs, etc.)
Implement eval/run_eval.rs binary that executes the suite against a running ThreatClaw instance and writes a JSON report
